summary.sosovalue: Overwhelmingly positive community sentiment towards SoSoValue. Users praise its data reliability (e.g., ETF flows cited by influencers like Wu Blockchain), ecosystem strength for research/trading, community rewards, and upcoming buildathon with $10K prize pool. Excitement around AI agents, ValueChain, and long-term user loyalty. Many replies/shares show engagement and hype.
summary.sodex: Strong positive sentiment for SoDEX, part of SoSoValue ecosystem. Traders share points farming progress (e.g., weekly recaps with profits), API alpha release, whitelist hype, and Turkish/Brazilian community guides urging verification for airdrops. Viewed as high-potential perp DEX with real utility.
summary.ssi: Limited direct mentions; neutral to factual. Appears in data shares (e.g., MAG7.SSI, SSI Index drops) via SoSoValue links, no strong emotional sentiment but tied to positive platform usage.
